response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep exposure to TypeScript, cloud infrastructure (AWS), and agentic workflows including MCP, aligning well with core requirements; however, his direct experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, and enterprise-grade GenAI production systems is implied but not explicitly documented, and his lack of advanced degree or clear leadership in multi-agent frameworks introduces uncertainty at the staff level.
strengths: Extensive experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Direct involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven track record in building scalable data systems and open-source developer tools
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases or RAG architecture implementation
Lack of documented leadership in multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph or CrewAI
Minimal evidence of enterprise customer-facing technical leadership or AI evaluation pipelines
